title: Guest Privileges - can we reduce them
excerpt: So I’m just currently looking in to what we can do with Guests on some of our boards. Functionality looks good apart from the fact that they can see way more stuff than I want them too and it is tough to lock down permis…

posts.author: darrylclark (Darryl)
posts.cookedHtml:
So I’m just currently looking in to what we can do with Guests on some of our boards. Functionality looks good apart from the fact that they can see way more stuff than I want them too and it is tough to lock down permissions just for Guest users.

For instance the Guest can click on both integrations and automations and whilst I’ve locked down board permissions so that members can only view the Guest gets to see the following account wide info for automations

image1328×764 37.5 KB

They can also see similar for integrations.

I also don’t want them to see all board activity in the log as well.

Am I missing a way to granularly adjust their access permissions? If not can I get this added to the roadmap please.
